steps.assistant_text: Reconstruction of a frameless bit-scan leaf (was ~13/22 wrong-structure NM wrap). 4 levers: (1) variable loop bound 's32 n=24' (register-held) defeats -O2 4x unroll + emits slt/bnezl single-body loop; (2) struct-cast-fold import_800201EC.ptr @0x154 (reloc to base, 0x154 folds into lw disp); (3) comma-init for(i=0,p=...;i<n;i++) counter-first for p->a0/i->v1 coloring + move v1,zero in lw delay; (4) hoist k=i>>3 so p+k is equal-complexity -> base-first addu (IXA operand-order).
